title: What Triggers an MHRA Inspection
alt: Checklist of the main triggers that prompt an MHRA inspection

items.label: Risk-based cycle
items.desc: Periodic re-inspection set by site risk, not a calendar rule

items.label: New applications & variations
items.desc: New MIA/WDA or major scope changes prompt pre-approval visits

items.label: Prior findings & weak CAPA
items.desc: Recurring deficiencies or poor remediation drive follow-ups

items.label: Recalls & quality defects
items.desc: Class 1/2 recalls and adverse trends signal systemic failure

items.label: Whistleblower intelligence
items.desc: Credible staff or regulator referrals trigger unannounced visits

items.label: Data integrity & supply chain
items.desc: ALCOA+ gaps, falsified medicines or cold-chain failures
